archetype: Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy (blended with Archetype 4 Swiss Clarity)
vibe: Ultra-clean, minimalistic, highly professional, approachable, and tech-forward. Avoiding cluttered dark cyberpunk tropes in favor of bright B2B environments and soft pastel abstractions.

rules: Use #0B1B3D (Deep Navy) for primary CTA buttons to provide a sharp, unnatural contrast against the soft pastels.
Never use pure black or grey. All neutral greys must be tinted slightly with blue (cool).
Gradient usage: Keep them subtle and ambient. Do not use high-contrast linear gradients for backgrounds. Use blurred radial spots of mint, icy blue, and warm sand.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-medium text-[#0F172A]
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-medium text-[#0F172A]

rules: Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans.
Headings must have tight letter spacing (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter).
Overlines/Labels MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing.
Avoid centering text by default; prioritize left-alignment for B2B readability.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical. p-8 to p-24.

surface_strategy.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-border_subtle). Minimal border radius (rounded-xl maximum). No heavy drop shadows. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-sm.
surface_strategy.glassmorphism: Used ONLY for sticky headers. bg-white/70, backdrop-blur-xl, 1px delicate inner stroke (border-white/40). Do not use for health/education data displays.

rules: Hover States: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. Use a slightly lighter/darker hue of the active state.
Entrance: Staggered fade-up for lists and grid items.
Motion: Minimalist and purposeful. No bouncy or distracting animations.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.

ibm.description: IBM Logo for the 'Proven Track Record' section.

pastel_gradient.description: Soft muted pastel gradient background. Use in Hero section or Lead Gen wrapper.

hero_ai.description: Minimal abstract 3D composition for AI. Use as the main visual in the Hero section.

core_tech.description: Clean abstract representation of a data workflow. Use in the Core Technologies bento grid.

nature_ai.description: Organic neural pathways. Good for the Partnership Models section background accent.

campus.description: Modern university glass building. Use in the Track Record / Academic Integration section.

corporate_training.description: Professional corporate training seminar. Use for the FDP / Bootcamp offerings.

page_sections.name: Navigation
page_sections.layout: Sticky Header with Crystal Glassmorphism. Text-based logo 'Neural Axis' on left, links center, 'Book Consultation' CTA on right.

page_sections.name: Hero Section
page_sections.layout: Split layout. Left: Overline 'Industry Integration Partner', H1 'Advanced AI & Data Science', Subtext, two CTAs ('Partner With Us' solid navy, 'Book a Free Workshop' subtle outline). Right: Floating glassmorphic card containing `hero_ai` image over `pastel_gradient` background.

page_sections.name: Core Technologies
page_sections.layout: Bento Grid (Mode A: Tetris). Span logic mixing 3 shapes. The Hero card (col-span-8) featuring `core_tech` abstract image and detailing 'Agentic AI Workflows'. Smaller cards for Python, ML, DL. Generous p-8 padding inside cards.
components: divs with border-subtle and flat backgrounds

page_sections.name: Partnership Models
page_sections.layout: Grid of 3 tall cards. 'Faculty Development Programs' (featuring corporate_training image), 'Intensive Student Bootcamps', 'Curriculum Integration'. Cards must have 1px solid stroke, muted pastel hover states.

page_sections.name: Proven Track Record
page_sections.layout: Asymmetric layout. Editorial Ribbon Marquee slowly scrolling university and corporate partner names (including IBM). Visuals showcasing `campus` photography. Massive stat '8+ Years' taking up negative space.
components: react-fast-marquee (slow, serene drift, serif or mono text)

page_sections.name: Lead Generation / Contact
page_sections.layout: Two-column page structure. Left: Context/Authority text. Right: Single-column vertical stacked form in a clean white card. Labels ABOVE fields. Minimal fields: Name, Role (TPO/Dean/HOD), Institution, Email.
components: Shadcn Form, Input, Select, Button. Customized to remove Vercel-look.

page_sections.name: Admin Dashboard
page_sections.layout: Control Room Grid. Strict hierarchy, dense spacing. Sidebar navigation. Main area showing lead table and metrics.
components: Shadcn Table, Cards, Dialogs. No full-screen gradients. Vibrant primary + neutral monochrome.

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for any typography.
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute.
Use the exact media URLs provided in the media_assets object. Do NOT use placeholders.
When building the contact form, follow the B2B SaaS trend: labels outside/above inputs, single column, clean minimal aesthetic.
For the admin panel, prioritize functional clarity. Use Shadcn components heavily but adapt them to the pastel/earthy light theme.
